1â†’-- Enable extensions
     2â†’create extension if not exists "uuid-ossp";
     3â†’create extension if not exists "pgcrypto";
     4â†’
     5â†’-- MERCHANTS
     6â†’create table public.merchants (
     7â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
     8â†’  user_id uuid references auth.users(id) on delete cascade not null,
     9â†’  name text not null,
    10â†’  logo_url text,
    11â†’  address text,
    12â†’  category text,
    13â†’  plan text not null default 'free' check (plan in ('free', 'pro', 'business')),
    14â†’  subscription_status text not null default 'active',
    15â†’  stripe_customer_id text,
    16â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    17â†’  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
    18â†’);
    19â†’
    20â†’-- LOYALTY PROGRAMS
    21â†’create table public.loyalty_programs (
    22â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
    23â†’  merchant_id uuid references public.merchants(id) on delete cascade not null,
    24â†’  type text not null check (type in ('stamp', 'points')),
    25â†’  name text not null,
    26â†’  stamp_goal int,
    27â†’  points_per_euro numeric(10,2),
    28â†’  reward_description text,
    29â†’  expiration_days int,
    30â†’  is_active boolean not null default true,
    31â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    32â†’  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
    33â†’);
    34â†’
    35â†’-- REWARDS
    36â†’create table public.rewards (
    37â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
    38â†’  program_id uuid references public.loyalty_programs(id) on delete cascade not null,
    39â†’  name text not null,
    40â†’  description text,
    41â†’  points_cost int,
    42â†’  stamps_required int,
    43â†’  discount_type text not null check (discount_type in ('percentage', 'fixed', 'freebie')),
    44â†’  discount_value numeric(10,2) not null default 0,
    45â†’  is_active boolean not null default true,
    46â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
    47â†’);
    48â†’
    49â†’-- QR CODES
    50â†’create table public.qr_codes (
    51â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
    52â†’  merchant_id uuid references public.merchants(id) on delete cascade not null,
    53â†’  program_id uuid references public.loyalty_programs(id) on delete cascade not null,
    54â†’  label text,
    55â†’  secret_key text not null default encode(gen_random_bytes(32), 'hex'),
    56â†’  is_active boolean not null default true,
    57â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
    58â†’);
    59â†’
    60â†’-- CUSTOMERS (extends auth.users)
    61â†’create table public.customers (
    62â†’  id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
    63â†’  email text not null,
    64â†’  name text,
    65â†’  phone text,
    66â†’  push_token text,
    67â†’  preferred_language text not null default 'en',
    68â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    69â†’  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
    70â†’);
    71â†’
    72â†’-- CUSTOMER CARDS
    73â†’create table public.customer_cards (
    74â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
    75â†’  customer_id uuid references public.customers(id) on delete cascade not null,
    76â†’  program_id uuid references public.loyalty_programs(id) on delete cascade not null,
    77â†’  current_stamps int not null default 0,
    78â†’  current_points numeric(10,2) not null default 0,
    79â†’  tier text not null default 'bronze' check (tier in ('bronze', 'silver', 'gold', 'vip')),
    80â†’  last_activity timestamptz not null default now(),
    81â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    82â†’  unique(customer_id, program_id)
    83â†’);
    84â†’
    85â†’-- TRANSACTIONS
    86â†’create table public.transactions (
    87â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
    88â†’  card_id uuid references public.customer_cards(id) on delete cascade not null,
    89â†’  type text not null check (type in ('stamp_add', 'points_add', 'reward_redeem')),
    90â†’  value numeric(10,2) not null default 0,
    91â†’  validated_by text not null default 'qr' check (validated_by in ('qr', 'nfc', 'manual')),
    92â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
    93â†’);
    94â†’
    95â†’-- CAMPAIGNS
    96â†’create table public.campaigns (
    97â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
    98â†’  merchant_id uuid references public.merchants(id) on delete cascade not null,
    99â†’  title text not null,
   100â†’  body text not null,
   101â†’  image_url text,
   102â†’  type text not null default 'push' check (type in ('push', 'in_app', 'targeted_ad')),
   103â†’  target_segment text not null default 'all' check (target_segment in ('all', 'new', 'inactive', 'vip', 'custom')),
   104â†’  scheduled_at timestamptz,
   105â†’  sent_at timestamptz,
   106â†’  status text not null default 'draft' check (status in ('draft', 'scheduled', 'sent', 'cancelled')),
   107â†’  opens int not null default 0,
   108â†’  clicks int not null default 0,
   109â†’  conversions int not null default 0,
   110â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
   111â†’);
   112â†’
   113â†’-- NOTIFICATIONS
   114â†’create table public.notifications (
   115â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
   116â†’  customer_id uuid references public.customers(id) on delete cascade not null,
   117â†’  campaign_id uuid references public.campaigns(id) on delete set null,
   118â†’  title text not null,
   119â†’  body text not null,
   120â†’  type text not null check (type in ('campaign', 'reward_available', 'expiration_warning', 'proximity', 'welcome', 'referral')),
   121â†’  read_at timestamptz,
   122â†’  sent_at timestamptz not null default now(),
   123â†’  deep_link text
   124â†’);
   125â†’
   126â†’-- REFERRALS
   127â†’create table public.referrals (
   128â†’  id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
   129â†’  referrer_id uuid references public.customers(id) on delete cascade not null,
   130â†’  referred_id uuid references public.customers(id) on delete cascade,
   131â†’  merchant_id uuid references public.merchants(id) on delete cascade,
   132â†’  referral_code text not null unique,
   133â†’  reward_given boolean not null default false,
   134â†’  status text not null default 'pending' check (status in ('pending', 'completed', 'expired')),
   135â†’  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
   136â†’);
   137â†’
   138â†’-- INDEXES
   139â†’create index idx_loyalty_programs_merchant on public.loyalty_programs(merchant_id);
   140â†’create index idx_rewards_program on public.rewards(program_id);
   141â†’create index idx_customer_cards_customer on public.customer_cards(customer_id);
   142â†’create index idx_customer_cards_program on public.customer_cards(program_id);
   143â†’create index idx_transactions_card on public.transactions(card_id);
   144â†’create index idx_campaigns_merchant on public.campaigns(merchant_id);
   145â†’create index idx_notifications_customer on public.notifications(customer_id);
   146â†’create index idx_qr_codes_merchant on public.qr_codes(merchant_id);
   147â†’
   148â†’-- UPDATED_AT TRIGGER
   149â†’create or replace function public.handle_updated_at()
   150â†’returns trigger as $$
   151â†’begin
   152â†’  new.updated_at = now();
   153â†’  return new;
   154â†’end;
   155â†’$$ language plpgsql;
   156â†’
   157â†’create trigger merchants_updated_at before update on public.merchants
   158â†’  for each row execute function public.handle_updated_at();
   159â†’create trigger loyalty_programs_updated_at before update on public.loyalty_programs
   160â†’  for each row execute function public.handle_updated_at();
   161â†’create trigger customers_updated_at before update on public.customers
   162â†’  for each row execute function public.handle_updated_at();
   163â†’

content.text:
All done. Here is a summary of what was implemented:

## Task 21 Complete: Stripe Integration (Merchant Subscriptions)

**Commit:** `3a14331` - feat: integrate Stripe subscriptions with plan enforcement

**Files created/modified (8 total):**

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\app\api\stripe\checkout\route.ts` | Created - Stripe Checkout session API route |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\app\api\stripe\webhook\route.ts` | Created - Stripe webhook handler with admin Supabase client |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\app\(dashboard)\subscription\page.tsx` | Created - Subscription pricing page with 3 plan cards |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\supabase\migrations\004_plan_limits.sql` | Created - DB trigger enforcing program limits per plan |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\.env.example` | Modified - Added Stripe + service role env vars |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\components\dashboard-sidebar.tsx` | Modified - Added Subscription nav link |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\package.json` | Modified - Added `stripe` dependency |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\pnpm-lock.yaml` | Modified - Updated lockfile |

**What was built:**

1. **Checkout API** (`/api/stripe/checkout`) - Creates Stripe Checkout sessions for Pro/Business plans. Creates a Stripe customer on first checkout and stores `stripe_customer_id` on the merchant.

2. **Webhook API** (`/api/stripe/webhook`) - Handles `subscription.created`, `subscription.updated`, and `subscription.deleted` events. Uses Supabase admin client (service role) to update merchant `plan` and `subscription_status` columns.

3. **Subscription Page** (`/subscription`) - Client component with 3 pricing cards (Free: 0 EUR, Pro: 29 EUR/mo, Business: 79 EUR/mo). Shows current plan highlighted, upgrade buttons redirect to Stripe Checkout, and displays success/cancelled messages from URL params.

4. **Plan Limits Migration** - PostgreSQL trigger function `check_program_limit()` that enforces: Free = 1 program max, Pro = 3 programs max, Business = unlimited.

5. **Sidebar Navigation** - Added "Subscription" link with Sparkles icon to the dashboard sidebar.

**TypeScript check:** Passed cleanly with zero errors.
